channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Morbid Metal developer explains why he ditched an origami art direction in favor of gritty sci-fi — 'It worked, but it didn't really feel like me'
item.description: Morbid Metal developer Felix Schade on the art direction of his new action game.

item.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
item.description: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

item.title: Southwest Is About to Limit Power Banks on Flights
item.description: External chargers can spontaneously combust, creating flames that are tough to put out.
